metadata.title: CalcolaFerie — Italian Holiday & Leave Planner
metadata.description: Italian holiday bridge calculator: find the best opportunities around Italian public holidays and optimize your time off.
metadata.socialDescription: Find the best holiday bridges around Italian public holidays and optimize your time off.
metadata.privacyDescription: CalcolaFerie privacy notice covering the newsletter, analytics, and affiliate links.

home.accessibleDescription: Optimize your leave around Italian public holidays: enter your leave budget and discover the best bridges to maximize your vacation while using the fewest leave days.

planner.title: CalcolaFerie
planner.subtitle: Find the best bridges over the next 12 months, distinguishing leave days, company closures, and mandatory leave.

about.title: Italian holiday bridge calculator
about.description: Optimize your leave around Italian public holidays: enter your leave budget and find the best bridges to maximize vacation time with the fewest leave days.
about.disclaimer: Results are indicative: always check local holidays, your contract, and your employer's rules before planning leave.

form.title: Scenario
form.daysOffHelp: If the company closes without using leave, choose free day. If the day is deducted from your leave allowance, choose mandatory day.

results.title: Recommended bridges
results.bestSummary: {staccoDays, plural, one {# day off} other {# days off}} using {costDays, plural, one {# leave day} other {# leave days}}. {explanation}
results.budgetWarning: Your selections exceed the available budget by {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}.
results.notStartedDescription: Enter your budget and press Calculate to see ranked opportunities.
results.noResultsDescription: Try increasing your budget or adding holidays and closures in the period.
results.affiliateDisclosure: Affiliate link: if you book, we receive a commission at no extra cost to you.
results.disclaimer: Results are indicative. Check patron saint holidays and your contract/employer rules.

explanation.noLeave: No leave needed — the whole period is already free
explanation.leaveCost: {costDays, plural, one {# leave day} other {# leave days}}
explanation.result: {costPhrase} = {staccoDays, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} off

calendar.title: Year view
calendar.selectionCount: {count, plural, one {# leave day selected} other {# leave days selected}}
calendar.selectionHelp: Tap a working or recommended day. Ctrl+click (⌘ on Mac) to select the whole range.
calendar.emptyDescription: The year view uses different colors for holidays, closures, and recommended leave.

newsletter.title: Useful updates
newsletter.consent: I consent to the processing of my email address to receive CalcolaFerie updates and have read the {privacyPolicy}.
newsletter.success: Check your email to confirm your subscription.
newsletter.error: Subscription failed. Please try again shortly.

footer.tagline: Italian holiday bridges, optimized for your leave budget.
footer.copyright: © {year} CalcolaFerie · Results are indicative: always check local holidays and your contract rules.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This notice covers the only areas where CalcolaFerie touches data or external services: the newsletter (product updates and an annual reminder when the new calendar and holiday data are ready), aggregate visit statistics, and affiliate links for booking bridge dates. Bridge calculations run in your browser and send us no data.

controller.title: Controller and contact
controller.body: The data controller is CalcolaFerie's maintainer, Spatariu Rares. For privacy requests, email <email>privacy@calcolaferie.it</email>. The GitHub profile is an additional contact channel: <github>SpatariuRares</github>.

data.title: Data collected
data.newsletter: When you subscribe to the newsletter, we collect your email address. Buttondown, our newsletter provider, may also record the subscription time, provider technical metadata, and technical data normally needed to send email and manage the list.
data.analytics: For visit statistics, we receive only aggregate data from Vercel Web Analytics. Bridge calculations, leave budgets, selected dates, and entered holidays remain in the browser; we remove URL parameters before sending data to Analytics.
data.storage: When you ask us to save settings, we use browser localStorage under the key calcolaferie_config. It contains your leave budget, closure or mandatory-leave dates, patron saint day, and selected leave dates. This is technical storage requested by you to remember planner settings and is exempt from consent under Article 5(3) of the ePrivacy Directive.

purposes.title: Purposes and legal bases
purposes.newsletter: We use your newsletter email only to send CalcolaFerie updates and an annual reminder when holiday calendars are updated. Subscription requires email confirmation through double opt-in before activation. The legal basis is your explicit consent, which you may withdraw at any time.
purposes.analytics: We use aggregate visit statistics to understand which pages work and improve the service. The legal basis is our legitimate interest in measuring site use with minimized data, without third-party cookies or query strings.
purposes.affiliate: Affiliate links support the project. The legal basis is our legitimate interest in monetizing the service transparently; clicking takes you to external services that process data under their own notices.

recipients.title: Recipients and providers
recipients.body: We use Buttondown for the newsletter, Vercel for hosting and Web Analytics, and Travelpayouts or the booking provider when you click an affiliate link. We do not sell personal data to third parties.

transfers.title: Transfers outside the EEA
transfers.body: Some providers may process data outside the European Economic Area. Where necessary, transfers must rely on the EU–US Data Privacy Framework (or Standard Contractual Clauses as an alternative safeguard).

analytics.title: Visit statistics
analytics.body: We use Vercel Web Analytics to understand, in aggregate, which pages are visited and improve the service. Vercel Analytics uses no third-party cookies: it identifies visits using a request hash and automatically discards sessions after 24 hours. We remove URL parameters before sending data, so shareable links containing budgets or dates are not included in statistics.

affiliate.title: Affiliate links
affiliate.links: Each bridge includes a link to book the suggested dates. These are affiliate links: if you book through them, we receive a small commission at no extra cost to you. Links pass only the bridge dates, no destination, and take you to the provider search through Travelpayouts.
affiliate.cookies: We set no tracking cookies from our domain and add no advertising, cookie banners, or Google Analytics. After you click a link, the booking provider may set cookies on its own domain under its privacy notice.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: We retain your newsletter email and double opt-in confirmation status while you remain subscribed or as needed to manage the list. Vercel Web Analytics retains visit sessions for 24 hours and displays aggregate metrics. Local planner data remains in your browser until you clear it or change saved settings.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You may request access, rectification, erasure, restriction, data portability, objection to processing based on legitimate interest, and withdrawal of newsletter consent. We normally respond within one month. You may also complain to the Italian Data Protection Authority or the competent authority in your EU country.

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribing
unsubscribe.body: You can unsubscribe at any time using the unsubscribe link in every newsletter email.

requests.title: Privacy requests
requests.body: For data or privacy requests, email <email>privacy@calcolaferie.it</email>. You may also contact the maintainer through the GitHub profile <github>SpatariuRares</github>.
